programme.title: World's Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: A journey to discover the world's most extraordinary hotels, including a brutalist lodge in Bolivia, a mirrored resort on a Norwegian fjord and an art deco hotel in the Pyrenees.

programme.title: Plane
programme.desc: Action thriller starring Gerard Butler as an airline pilot who becomes a one-man army after crash landing on an island overrun by bad guys. To survive, he's gonna have to wing it.

programme.title: Commando
programme.desc: Thriller starring Arnold Schwarzenegger. To free his kidnapped daughter, an ex US commando must agree to assassinate a South American president. But he's not as pliant as he seems..

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: In a particularly active episode, Armando Iannucci performs a daring stunt, Kumail Nanjiani moves bowling pins with oven gloves, and Joanna Page unwisely attempts a handstand.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits Casa Roma, the oldest restaurant in Lancaster, California. Although the bar is a success, the restaurant is failing and has had 20 chefs in two years.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In and around Edinburgh, there are some hard-to-digest jokes, a cat hair catastrophe and a boy band revelation, as three couples put their hosting skills to the ultimate test.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: George visits a handsome, turn-of-the-century terrace home, whose new owners are set on a monochrome colour scheme, and a workshop that makes antique-effect mirrors.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Inspired by the movie The Bridges of Madison County, Marge sits the family down to discuss tales of love. Guest starring Michelle Pfeiffer.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Flanders loses his cool when his laid-back parents start to prefer Homer's company to his own. Lisa is bullied by her new substitute teacher (Tina Fey).

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart's accused of playing a prank on the school marching band - a prank he says he didn't commit - Lisa must step in to defend her brother in court.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trendy new reverend recruits Homer as a deacon. Dry cleaners accidentally swap Marge's wedding dress for one of Krusty's clown costumes.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug bows to pressure to start playing American football again, to help with his fitness levels.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug is jealous of Carrie's close relationship with a gay colleague. Arthur's jealous of a dog.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie gets jealous of Doug's ex-girlfriend's relationship with Doug's mother.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug regrets taking a dirty photo at a wedding.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ally's constantly getting into bed with her parents, complaining about monsters in her room. Sleep-deprived Ray tries everything to solve the problem.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra discovers that her mother-in-law prefers Robert's girlfriend solely on the basis that she's a 'good girl', making Debra wonder what exactly a 'good girl' is.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra's upset when Ray fails to back her up in an argument with a competitive parent about 'unapproved' pretzels at Ally's little league game.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Don't Go Breaking My Heart (Part 3/3): Frasier's driven round the bend by the new lease of life that Niles has acquired following his midlife crisis.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Christmas is coming and so, it seems, is a Crane family feud. Niles and Daphne want to hold the family get-together, but Frasier decides that he'll host too..

programme.title: Live: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Alex James talks about the Big Feastival 2026. SNL UK regulars Paddy Young and Ania Magliano chat about the show. Plus: Tyler West, Chloe Burrows, Damien Molony, Jessie Ware and Skindred.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Moe, Lenny and Carl win the lottery, but Carl runs off to Iceland with the winnings.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: While she's browsing for wedding anniversary cakes, Marge stumbles across a website for married people who want to have affairs.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart doesn't want to go to piano lessons, until he meets his beautiful teacher... Homer loses the last two hairs on his head.

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: A touring theatre performer has an ingenious plan to keep the show on the road... quite literally! And George and Will complete their ambitious secret magical garden studio flat.

programme.title: Sailing the Shipping Forecast with The Rev Richard Coles
programme.desc: Richard meets the rebels and risk takers of Thames, barges about on a floating bakery and returns to his Communards youth.

programme.title: Our Tiny Islands
programme.desc: We run around all five isles of Scilly, meet royalty on Piel Island, get spiritual on Bardsey Island and visit extremely remote St Kilda.

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In the Exmoor foothills, farmers Rob and Sarah Taylor prepare their native ponies for the show season. And can Cornwall's South West Coastal Path be saved from the threat of erosion.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Inside the World's Most Luxurious Yachts
programme.desc: A voyage behind the scenes of the status-symbol superyachts belonging to some of the world's wealthiest movers and shakers, from Monaco to the Netherlands.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up To Cancer
programme.desc: It's a spouse and sibling rivalry, as Chris and Rosie Ramsey and Scarlette and Stuart Douglas take each other on and recreate career highlights in cake.

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Edinburgh locals perform the one song that tells their story - from the tune a 22-year-old played at his mum's funeral to the Zach Bryan track that helped an ex-soldier with his PTSD.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Secret Garden, Love on the Spectrum, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Conspiracies and Coverups and the Housemaid.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A hair stylist meets a nutritionist with a bit of 'swag'. A conspiracy theorist is matched with a science teacher who also wrestles. And an opera singer serenades his date.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay infiltrates struggling restaurants with the help of a secret insider. In his first mission, Gordon spies on a family-run Greek eatery that's gone downhill.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay infiltrates struggling restaurants with the help of a secret insider. Can Gordon change owner Patrick's toxic ways to save his business - and his marriage.

programme.title: Outrageous Homes
programme.desc: Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen checks out the UK's most unconventional and eclectic homes, including a barn that pays homage to Treasure Island and a magnificently mosaicked house.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: George is out and about with his sledgehammer, knocking holes in a fake Tudor ceiling in Leamington Spa and moving doors in a farmhouse on the edge of the Peak District.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, three couples compete in a week featuring refined dining, strippergram revelations and awkward conversations about age differences.

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Some extra brunch as Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer host the food and chat show.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Moe, Lenny and Carl win the lottery, but Carl runs off to Iceland with the winnings.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: While she's browsing for wedding anniversary cakes, Marge stumbles across a website for married people who want to have affairs.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart doesn't want to go to piano lessons, until he meets his beautiful teacher... Homer loses the last two hairs on his head.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Another chance to catch Friday's new episode, with Ranvir Singh in Dictionary Corner. Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A nervous Diane tries to create a good impression when she meets Frasier's mum Hester. But Hester gives Diane some dire warnings..

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla's ex-husband Nick returns with his new bride, demanding custody of their eldest son. And everyone's shocked when Carla agrees to the request.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: After moving in with Frasier, Diane develops a chronic allergy that she thinks is caused by his dog. But is her reaction psychosomatic.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert's traffic school students are bored by his class, so he introduces Traffic Cop Timmy, a puppet who's anything but boring.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray becomes concerned with his own mortality when he discovers that he's shrunk a quarter of an inch and is no longer six feet tall.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray's shocked when Debra takes all their baby stuff to a garage sale. He didn't know that they'd decided not to have any more children.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles enjoy the plush comforts of Seattle's premier spa and are happy with their pampering - until they discover there's a 'Gold Level'.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Tension mounts when Frasier's forced to share his studio and airtime with the station's new finance reporter, an arrogant ex-stock market analyst.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Lilith pays an unexpected visit to Seattle and tells Frasier that she would like another child through artificial insemination.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles plans a very special dinner party to mark the purchase of a new painting he's bought for Daphne. But catastrophe ensues.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Can Gordon Ramsay get two brothers to work through their problems and save their failing New York diner.

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Birmingham, Henry Cole stumbles upon a model metal tipper truck which he's convinced will make money.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: The Bakers bring Bowes Museum's marvellous mechanical swan back to life, and relive fond family memories at High Force waterfall.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Carpenter David from Suffolk wants an apartment near the beach in Abruzzo on Italy's east coast. Craig Rowe shows him what his £45,000 can buy.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Gîte owners Mark and Lesley take flight with a new idea over a Normandy beach. Fitness instructor Ali sets sail on a new adventure.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Erin and JB race to light up their salon. Anna and Edward rebuild their lake's sweeping stairway. Christina and Sassan transform their grand front gates.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: A new series with our favourite family-run estate agents. In Almería, the Garners juggle wow-factor villas and a wildcard. Lisa and John face tough compromises on the Costa Blanca.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.
